001/**
002 * Immutable pair of tokens representing one player command.
003 * <p>
004 * The first token is the command verb; the second is an optional argument
005 * (for example the direction in {@code go north}).
006 * </p>
007 *
008 * @author Barnabe Jouanard
009 * @version 2026.02.17
010 */
011public class Command {
012    /** Primary verb, or {@code null} when the input was not recognized. */
013    private String aCommandWord;
014    /** Optional second token; {@code null} if none was supplied. */
015    private String aSecondWord;
016
017    /**
018     * Creates a command. Either argument may be {@code null} depending on user
019     * input.
020     *
021     * @param pCommandWord the recognized verb, or {@code null} if unknown
022     * @param pSecondWord  the argument word, or {@code null} if absent
023     */
024    public Command(final String pCommandWord, final String pSecondWord) {
025        this.aCommandWord = pCommandWord;
026        this.aSecondWord = pSecondWord;
027    } // Command()
028
029    /**
030     * Returns the command word (first token).
031     *
032     * @return the verb, or {@code null} if the command was not understood
033     */
034    public String getCommandWord() {
035        return this.aCommandWord;
036    } // getCommandWord()
037
038    /**
039     * Returns the second word of this command, if any.
040     *
041     * @return the second token, or {@code null}
042     */
043    public String getSecondWord() {
044        return this.aSecondWord;
045    } // getSecondWord()
046
047    /**
048     * Indicates whether a second token was present.
049     *
050     * @return {@code true} if {@link #getSecondWord()} is not {@code null}
051     */
052    public boolean hasSecondWord() {
053        return this.aSecondWord != null;
054    } // hasSecondWord()
055
056    /**
057     * Indicates whether the parser recognized the command word.
058     *
059     * @return {@code true} if {@link #getCommandWord()} is {@code null}
060     */
061    public boolean isUnknown() {
062        return this.aCommandWord == null;
063    } // isUnknown()
064} // Command
